header.subtitle: Stay in control and anticipate problems
header.metrics: Over 1,000 productions have already been tracked with Kitsu!
header.explanation: With Kitsu, schedule each task, track time spent, and set quotas. Use indicators to anticipate problems and build clear production reports. Always have an overview of your production, both at a high and granular level.

features.title: Gain a 360° view of your data
features.subtitle: Production reports
features.content: With Kitsu, you can view statistics on your projects progress. It provides high-level reports for a quick overview of what is happening. Exports are available for sending reports to third parties.

features.title: Schedule your work
features.subtitle: Planning
features.content: In the schedule module, you can set the main duration and milestones of your project. This allows you to see resource allocation and plan your production more effectively.

features.title: Set your expectations
features.subtitle: Quotas
features.content: Monitor the productivity of your artists and ensure that no one is blocked. Set productivity goals and ensure quotas are met.
